---
title: Tech jobs have grown substantially since the Great Recession
description: Line chart showing tech employment growth relative to 2007 baseline.
date: '2026-05-07'
layout: default
permalink: /charts/rural-economic-outlook-line-chart-tech-jobs-growth-2007-baseline/
categories:
  - Chart
  - Labor Market
  - Technology
tags:
  - FRED
  - Tech Employment
  - Information Sector
  - National
  - Post-Great Recession
  - Line Chart
image: line_chart_tech_jobs_growth_2007_baseline.svg
chart:
  title: Tech jobs have grown substantially since the Great Recession
  chartType: line
  interactive: false
  source: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
  sourceUrl: https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/LEU0254476900A
  featured: false
producedBy: rural-economic-outlook
usesDatasets:
  - fred-tech-employment
usesPackages: []
usesResources: []
format:
  gfm:
    toc: false
    wrap: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

![This chart tracks tech employment growth since the Great Recession, showing strong recovery and expansion in the technology sector.](./line_chart_tech_jobs_growth_2007_baseline.svg)

## Overview

This chart tracks tech employment growth since the Great Recession, showing strong recovery and expansion in the technology sector.

## Key Findings

- Tech employment has grown substantially since 2007
- The sector showed resilience during the Great Recession
- Tech job growth has outpaced overall employment growth

## Reproducibility

Generated by `R/viz/presentation/2007_2025_tech_jobs_viz.R` in the producing project.


::: {.callout-note}
## Dangling references

The following slugs are referenced by this project but do not yet have nodes in Dataverse. They are intentionally preserved as future content needs:

- `dataset/fred-tech-employment`
:::
